label: Two Columns
description: Two side-by-side text columns. Good for comparison content or grouping related information.

settings.heading: Why prepare now
settings.left_body:
• Phones are jammed in the first hour
  • Stores are sold out within 90 minutes
  • You're driving to find shelter at the worst possible time
  • You don't know which neighbors need help
settings.right_body:
• 72 hours of supplies already in the closet
  • Block coordinator already has your roster
  • Pre-planned evacuation route from your address
  • Neighbors who know each other and check in

presets.name: What we do / What we don't

settings.heading: PNEC scope
settings.left_body:
• Train block coordinators
  • Run drills and the annual Safety Fair
  • Maintain household rosters per block
  • Publish preparedness guides specific to Poway terrain
settings.right_body:
• We're not first responders — call 911
  • We don't operate shelters during evacuation
  • We don't replace your home insurance
  • We don't provide medical care

settings.heading: Two ways to participate
settings.left_body: Free. Connects you to your block coordinator and gives you access to drills, guides, and the member newsletter.
settings.right_body: Free. Joins you to a coordinator team or event-helper pool. ~4 hours per year. Training provided.
